profile: Passionate Full Stack Developer specializing in designing high-performance and scalable web applications with Angular and Spring Boot. Experienced in integrating payment solutions (Stripe), optimizing UX with NgRx, and managing authentication via Keycloak. Accustomed to Agile methodologies, I actively participate in code reviews and support teams to ensure quality and collaboration.

education.institution: ESPRIM – Private University of Engineering of Monastir

education.degree: Applied Bachelor's Degree in Computer Systems and Software
education.institution: ISIMM – Higher Institute of Computer Science and Mathematics of Monastir

projects.name: FLOW – BIAT
projects.team: Business Analyst, 3 Developers, Tech Lead, Tester
projects.description: Design and development of an intelligent platform improving customer relationships and increasing commercial performance by 15% within the first year.
responsibilities: Creation and structuring of the Angular project with a scalable and modular architecture
Initial configuration (routing, shared services, error handling, environments)
Interface development with HTML, SCSS, TypeScript
Integration of Spring Boot REST APIs
UX optimization and compliance with UI standards
Manual, regression, and functional validation testing
